title: alangium longiflorum var. longiflorum
intro: Alangium longiflorum var. longiflorum is a plant species belonging to the family Cornaceae, commonly known as the East Asian alangium. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, Alangium longiflorum var. longiflorum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots are typically dried or crushed for medicinal use.
